name: Mentra Smart Glasses Channel
description: Integrates MentraOS G2 Smart Glasses as a native voice/display channel in OpenClaw.
author: openclaw-channel-mentra contributors

channels.name: MentraOS Smart Glasses
channels.description: Voice input via G2 microphone, text output on G2 display

channels.mentra.port.description: HTTP port the plugin listens on for inbound messages from the MentraOS App

channels.mentra.callbackUrl.description: URL the plugin POSTs agent responses to
